title: Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS
summary:
At Mobile World Congress on March 2, 2026, Motorola unveiled several new consumer and enterprise solutions, emphasizing advanced security.

A key announcement was a long-term partnership with the GrapheneOS Foundation, creators of a hardened, privacy-focused Android-based operating system. This collaboration aims to usher in a new era of smartphone security, with Motorola and GrapheneOS working together to strengthen mobile defenses and develop future devices engineered for GrapheneOS compatibility. This initiative combines GrapheneOS's engineering with Motorola's security expertise and Lenovo's ThinkShield solutions.

For enterprises, Motorola introduced Moto Analytics, a new platform providing IT administrators with real-time visibility into device performance across their fleet. It offers deep operational insights into app stability, battery health, and connectivity, enabling more efficient troubleshooting and proactive issue prevention.

Motorola also expanded its Moto Secure platform with Private Image Data, a new feature that automatically removes sensitive metadata, like location and device information, from all new camera images. This enhances user privacy by protecting hidden data without affecting the image itself and integrates into the Moto Secure app, Motorola's central hub for security tools.

These innovations reinforce Motorola's commitment to delivering intelligent, secure, and highly capable technology for both consumers and its growing enterprise portfolio.
chinese_title: 摩托罗拉宣布与GrapheneOS合作
chinese_summary:
2026年3月2日，在世界移动通信大会上，摩托罗拉发布了几款新的消费级和企业级解决方案，重点强调了其先进的安全性。

一项重要发布是，摩托罗拉与GrapheneOS基金会建立了长期合作伙伴关系，该基金会是强化型、注重隐私的安卓操作系统的开发者。此次合作旨在开启智能手机安全的新时代，摩托罗拉和GrapheneOS将携手加强移动防御，并开发未来兼容GrapheneOS的设备。这一举措融合了GrapheneOS的工程技术、摩托罗拉的安全专长以及联想的ThinkShield解决方案。

针对企业用户，摩托罗拉推出了Moto Analytics平台，该新平台可为IT管理员提供对其所有设备性能的实时可见性。它提供应用稳定性、电池健康状况和连接性等方面的深入运营洞察，从而实现更高效的故障排除和主动的问题预防。

摩托罗拉还通过“私密图像数据”扩展了其Moto Secure平台，这项新功能可自动从所有新的相机图像中删除位置和设备信息等敏感元数据。这项功能通过在不影响图像本身的情况下保护隐藏数据，从而增强了用户隐私，并集成到Moto Secure应用中，该应用是摩托罗拉安全工具的中心枢纽。

这些创新再次证明了摩托罗拉致力于为消费者及其不断增长的企业产品组合提供智能、安全且功能强大的技术。

title: Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns
summary:
Meta's new AI smart glasses, marketed as a powerful all-in-one assistant with user privacy control, are at the center of a major data privacy controversy. An investigation by Svenska Dagbladet and Göteborgs-Posten reveals that highly sensitive user data is being viewed by human annotators in low-income countries, directly contradicting Meta's privacy assurances.

In Nairobi, Kenya, thousands of data annotators working for Sama, a Meta subcontractor, manually train the AI systems. These workers describe seeing deeply private and intimate video clips from users, including bathroom visits, undressing, sex, and even visible bank cards or people watching porn. They express profound discomfort, believing users are unaware their private moments are being recorded and reviewed. Anonymization efforts are reportedly flawed, with faces and bodies sometimes visible.

Contrary to sales staff assurances that data remains local and under user control, the investigation found that the glasses require an internet connection, and data is constantly processed via Meta's servers for AI functions to work. Meta's terms of use confirm that voice, text, image, and video data are automatically processed and can undergo "manual (human)" review, with users having no option to opt out.

Data protection experts question the lack of transparency and explicit consent under GDPR, highlighting that users have little idea what happens to their data. Former Meta employees acknowledge that while sensitive data isn't *intended* for training, it can reach annotators due to users' actions and algorithmic failures. Meta has not provided an open interview to address these critical privacy concerns.
chinese_title: Meta的AI智能眼镜和数据隐私问题
chinese_summary:
Meta新款AI智能眼镜，被宣传为一款拥有用户隐私控制的强大一体化助手，正处于一场重大的数据隐私争议中心。《瑞典日报》和《哥德堡邮报》的一项调查显示，高度敏感的用户数据正被低收入国家的人工标注员查看，这直接与Meta的隐私保证相悖。

在肯尼亚内罗毕，数千名Meta分包商Sama的数据标注员正在手动训练其AI系统。这些工作人员描述称，他们看到了用户高度私密和亲密的视频片段，包括上厕所、脱衣服、性行为，甚至是清晰可见的银行卡或观看色情内容的人。他们表示深感不安，认为用户并不知道他们的私密时刻正在被记录和审查。据报道，匿名化处理存在缺陷，人脸和身体有时清晰可见。

与销售人员声称数据保留在本地并由用户控制的保证相反，调查发现该眼镜需要互联网连接，并且数据通过Meta的服务器持续处理，以使AI功能正常运行。Meta的使用条款证实，语音、文本、图像和视频数据会自动处理，并且可以进行“人工（人工）”审查，用户没有选择退出的选项。

数据保护专家质疑其在GDPR下缺乏透明度和明确同意，强调用户对自己的数据去向知之甚少。前Meta员工承认，尽管敏感数据并非*旨在*用于训练，但由于用户行为和算法故障，它仍可能被标注员看到。Meta尚未提供公开采访来回应这些关键的隐私担忧。

title: British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time
summary:
British Columbia is permanently adopting year-round daylight time, with Premier David Eby announcing that March 8 will be the last time most residents "spring forward." From November 1, 2026, the province will maintain its new "Pacific time," eliminating the twice-yearly clock changes. This decision does not affect eastern B.C. communities observing Mountain Time.

Eby justified the move by citing problems like lost sleep, animal disruption, and increased car accidents caused by time changes. Although legislation passed in 2019, B.C. had previously awaited similar actions from U.S. neighbours like Washington, Oregon, and California, none of whom have yet passed corresponding laws. The Yukon has already made this transition.

A 2019 public engagement report showed 93% of respondents preferred year-round daylight time, though over half emphasized the importance of aligning with other jurisdictions. UBC professor Werner Antweiler supported the decision, noting that time changes impose "jet lag on the entire population" and someone had to lead the way.

However, business groups expressed concerns. The Greater Vancouver Board of Trade called the unilateral change an "unwelcome distraction" that could hinder business attraction and create "additional headaches" for cross-border operations. The Vancouver Airport Authority stressed that alignment is "fundamental" for airline scheduling and operations. The Canadian Federation of Independent Business also warned of "confusion and disruption," suggesting the move might be a distraction from the province's deficit.
chinese_title: 不列颠哥伦比亚省永久采用夏令时
chinese_summary:
不列颠哥伦比亚省将永久实行全年夏令时，省长戴维·埃比宣布，3月8日将是大多数居民最后一次“拨快时钟”（进入夏令时）。从2026年11月1日起，该省将维持其新的“太平洋时间”，取消每年两次的调表。此决定不影响不列颠哥伦比亚省东部采用山区时间的社区。

埃比省长为此举辩护，理由是时间变化会导致睡眠不足、动物受干扰以及车祸增加等问题。尽管相关立法已于2019年通过，但不列颠哥伦比亚省此前一直在等待美国邻居华盛顿州、俄勒冈州和加利福尼亚州采取类似行动，然而这些州至今尚未通过相应的法律。育空地区已经完成了这一转变。

2019年的一份公众参与报告显示，93%的受访者倾向于全年夏令时，尽管超过半数的人强调与周边司法管辖区保持一致的重要性。不列颠哥伦比亚大学教授维尔纳·安特维勒支持这一决定，指出时间变化给“全体民众带来时差困扰”，总要有人先行一步。

然而，商业团体表达了担忧。大温哥华贸易局称，这种单边改变是“不受欢迎的干扰”，可能会阻碍商业吸引力，并给跨境运营带来“额外的麻烦”。温哥华机场管理局强调，（时间）保持一致对于航空公司航班时刻表和运营来说是“至关重要的”。加拿大独立企业联合会也警告称，此举可能导致“混乱和中断”，并暗示这可能是为了转移人们对该省赤字的注意力。

title: The Xkcd thing, now interactive
summary:
The article describes an interactive web project titled "The Xkcd thing, now interactive." This project is clearly inspired by the unique and often complex interactive comics and simulations created by Randall Munroe for his xkcd webcomic. The title implies that it takes a concept previously known as "the Xkcd thing" and makes it accessible for user interaction.

The project's content specifies "p5.js Web Editor," indicating that it is developed and runs within an online p5.js creative coding environment. p5.js is a JavaScript library well-suited for creating visual, animated, and interactive experiences directly in a web browser. Therefore, this "Xkcd thing" is a browser-based application designed for user engagement, likely featuring graphics, animations, and elements that respond to user input, in the spirit of xkcd's popular interactive features like "Click and Drag."
chinese_title: Xkcd 的那个，现已可互动
chinese_summary:
本文描述了一个交互式网页项目，题为“Xkcd玩意儿，现已交互化”。该项目显然受到了Randall Munroe为其xkcd网络漫画创作的独特且通常复杂的交互式漫画和模拟作品的启发。标题暗示它将一个之前被称为“Xkcd玩意儿”的概念，变得可供用户交互。

项目内容指明了“p5.js网页编辑器”，表明它是在一个在线p5.js创意编程环境中开发并运行的。p5.js是一个JavaScript库，非常适合直接在网页浏览器中创建视觉、动画和交互式体验。因此，这个“Xkcd玩意儿”是一个基于浏览器的应用程序，旨在增强用户参与度，可能包含图形、动画以及响应用户输入的元素，这与xkcd流行的交互功能（如“点击并拖动”）的精神一脉相承。

title: I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services
summary:
The author expresses strong reluctance to verify identity or age for any online service, finding current policy proposals on the matter poorly considered, lacking clear objectives, and overly reliant on "technosolutionism." Given their unusual, self-reliant computing habits—primarily accessing their own services, downloaded content, and FOSS alternatives—they anticipate being largely unaffected by such mandates for most platforms.

The author would readily abandon services like YouTube, RSS feeds, online forums, comment sections, and non-critical FOSS contributions if identity verification were required. They would opt for self-hosted alternatives like Kiwix for Wikipedia or rely on existing methods for video consumption. While Signal would pose a significant inconvenience without a clear workaround, the only area where they might be compelled to comply is with professional client communication tools like Teams/Zoom, due to practical necessities.

Despite their personal digital isolationism limiting the impact, the author objects to these measures on broader principle, viewing them as a form of censorship and a threat to privacy and data security.
chinese_title: 我不情愿为任何在线服务验证我的身份或年龄。
chinese_summary:
作者强烈不愿为任何在线服务验证身份或年龄，认为当前有关此事的政策提案考虑不周、目标不清，并且过度依赖“技术解决方案主义”。鉴于他们不同寻常的、自力更生的计算习惯——主要访问自己的服务、下载内容和FOSS（自由及开源软件）替代品——他们预计在大多数平台上将基本不受此类强制规定的影响。

如果要求身份验证，作者将毫不犹豫地放弃YouTube、RSS订阅、在线论坛、评论区以及非关键的FOSS贡献等服务。他们会选择像Kiwix这样自托管的维基百科替代品，或者依赖现有的视频观看方式。尽管Signal在没有明确变通方案的情况下会带来很大的不便，但他们可能被迫遵守的唯一领域是像Teams/Zoom这样的专业客户沟通工具，这是出于实际需要。

尽管他们的个人数字孤立主义限制了影响，作者仍然基于更广泛的原则反对这些措施，将它们视为一种审查形式，以及对隐私和数据安全的威胁。

title: /e/OS is a complete, fully “deGoogled” mobile ecosystem
summary:
/e/OS is a complete, open-source, "deGoogled" mobile ecosystem comprising an Android-based operating system, carefully selected applications, and privacy-enhanced online services. It meticulously removes all Google apps and services, replacing them with alternatives like Murena Find for search and microG for Google Services, ensuring no personal data is accessed by Google. The system has received academic recognition for its auditable privacy.

Key features include compatibility with Android apps, a curated suite of default open-source applications, and an App Lounge. A unique privacy-scoring system in the App Lounge informs users about trackers and permissions for each app. The Advanced Privacy widget offers control over IP address and geolocation, alongside a default ad blocker.

The Murena Workspace account is central, providing 1GB free storage, email, cloud services, and online office document collaboration with Murena Vault for end-to-end encryption, acting as an Office365 alternative. Parental control functionalities, including content filtering, screen time limits, and device location, are also integrated. The Account Manager allows syncing data from various providers while ensuring local storage and privacy.

Users can get /e/OS by purchasing a pre-installed Murena smartphone, using the web-based /e/OS Installer, or manually downloading and installing it for supported devices. Support is available through comprehensive user documentation, a community forum, a dedicated Telegram chat, resources for developers, and professional services.
chinese_title: /e/OS 是一个完整的、完全“去谷歌化”的移动生态系统。
chinese_summary:
/e/OS 是一个完整的、开源的、“去谷歌化”的移动生态系统，由基于安卓的操作系统、精心挑选的应用程序和增强隐私的在线服务组成。它彻底移除了所有谷歌应用程序和服务，并用替代品取而代之，例如用于搜索的 Murena Find 和用于谷歌服务的 microG，确保谷歌无法访问任何个人数据。该系统因其可审计的隐私性而获得了学术认可。

主要功能包括与安卓应用程序的兼容性、一套精选的默认开源应用程序和一个 App Lounge。App Lounge 中独特的隐私评分系统会告知用户每个应用程序的跟踪器和权限情况。高级隐私小部件提供对 IP 地址和地理位置的控制，并内置了默认的广告拦截器。

Murena Workspace 账户是核心，提供 1GB 免费存储空间、电子邮件、云服务以及通过 Murena Vault 实现端到端加密的在线办公文档协作，可作为 Office365 的替代方案。还集成了家长控制功能，包括内容过滤、屏幕时间限制和设备定位。账户管理器允许同步来自各种提供商的数据，同时确保本地存储和隐私。

用户可以通过购买预装 /e/OS 的 Murena 智能手机、使用基于网页的 /e/OS 安装程序，或为受支持的设备手动下载并安装来获取 /e/OS。支持可通过全面的用户文档、社区论坛、专门的 Telegram 聊天、面向开发者的资源和专业服务获得。

title: How to talk to anyone and why you should
summary:
The article highlights a growing societal reluctance to talk to strangers, viewing it as a critical loss with profound implications. The author recounts personal experiences—a conversation on a train and with a waitress—prompting her son to question the unspoken rules of engaging with unknown individuals. She concludes that many people, including themselves, have stopped taking a chance on these interactions.

This decline is attributed to modern factors like mobile phones, social media, remote work, touchscreens, the disappearance of "third spaces," and the pandemic, leading to "social norm reinforcement" where silence begets silence. Experts like Dr. Jared Cooney Horvath and Esther Perel warn of cognitive underperformance, low self-worth, and a "global relational recession" due to this diminishing social practice. The author also critiques performative social media "talking to strangers" videos, which often commodify and exploit interactions, making genuine connection seem even more alienating.

Contrary to widespread fear, studies suggest people overestimate the negative outcomes of talking to strangers and underestimate the enjoyment and connection. The solution, the article proposes, is to "lower the stakes," viewing these as "small, humanising acts." It encourages individuals to trust their social cues, accept that not everyone wants to talk, and give themselves "get-out-of-jail-free cards" if interactions don't go as planned.

Ultimately, the article argues that while small talk may not revolutionize individual lives, its absence fundamentally erodes shared humanity in an increasingly divided world. Engaging in these simple interactions is a "priceless reminder" of our common ground, and we must revive this skill before it's too late.
chinese_title: 如何与任何人交流，以及为何你应该
chinese_summary:
文章指出社会上与陌生人交谈的意愿日益减弱，认为这是具有深远影响的严重缺失。作者讲述了她的亲身经历——在火车上和与一位服务员的对话——这些经历促使她的儿子质疑与陌生人互动的潜在规则。她得出结论，包括她自己在内的许多人已经不再尝试进行这类互动了。

这种衰退归因于手机、社交媒体、远程工作、触摸屏、“第三空间”的消失以及疫情等现代因素，导致了“社会规范强化”，即沉默催生沉默。贾里德·库尼·霍瓦特博士和埃丝特·佩雷尔等专家警告说，由于这种日渐减少的社交实践，人们会出现认知能力下降、自尊心低落以及“全球人际关系衰退”。作者还批评了社交媒体上那些表演性的“与陌生人交谈”视频，这些视频往往将互动商品化并加以利用，反而让真正的联系显得更加疏远。

与普遍存在的恐惧相反，研究表明人们高估了与陌生人交谈的负面结果，却低估了其中的乐趣和联系。文章提出，解决方案是“降低风险”，将其视为“微小而富有 H 人情味的举动”。它鼓励人们相信自己的社交信号，接受并非所有人都愿意交谈的事实，并在互动不如预期时给自己“一张免死金牌”（即可以随时抽身，没有心理负担）。

最终，文章认为，虽然闲聊可能不会彻底改变个人生活，但在一个日益分裂的世界中，它的缺失从根本上侵蚀了人类的共同人性。参与这些简单的互动是对我们共同点的“无价提醒”，我们必须在为时已晚之前恢复这项技能。
